code_value: Hi, I'm Li Hua. I'm a middle school student. Last week, I got sick. It started on Monday evening. I had a fever and a bad headache. My temperature was 38.5 degrees. My mum took my temperature and said I had a fever. She gave me some medicine and told me to drink more water. I stayed in bed all day on Tuesday. I didn't go to school. On Wednesday, I still had a cough, but my fever was gone. I rested for two more days. By Friday, I felt much better. I went back to school on Monday. The doctor said I should exercise more and eat healthy food to stay strong. I learned that health is the most important thing.

你将听到一段有关李华生病经历的介绍，录音播放两遍。请根据所听到的内容，选择思维导图中正确的信息（二选一），在50秒钟内转述李华的介绍（包含四个要点的内容）。
